alertas.emptyDescription: Analyzers run every 15 minutes. Register managers and activate the hub in settings to start receiving smart alerts via WhatsApp.
alertas.footnote: Analyzers run every 15 minutes. Critical alerts go straight to WhatsApp; warnings and information are compiled into morning/afternoon/evening digests. When a manager replies "1", "2" or "3" via WhatsApp, the action is logged here in real time.

config.hubDescriptionOn: Analyzers running, alerts being sent to managers per routing rules.
config.hubDescriptionOff: All analyzers and delivery are paused. Activating creates the 7 default routing rules.
config.analyzersHint: Each analyzer runs automatically every 15 minutes. The minimum score discards weak signals before routing.
config.digestsHint: Warning/info severity alerts are compiled into digests at these times (timezone: {timezone}).
config.quietHoursHint: During this interval only critical alerts pass through. Warnings and infos wait for the digest.
config.antiSpamHint: Prevents alert fatigue — each manager has a daily message cap and a minimum interval between sends.
config.crossIntelSub: Combines 2+ signals from the same entity (e.g. stockout + delayed PO) into an enriched insight. Runs every 30 minutes.
config.learningSub: Computes action_rate per manager/category daily (3am). The data appears in Reports.
config.routingRulesHint: Defines which department receives which type of alert. Each rule covers one pair (department × analyzer). The minimum score filters severity.
config.noRules: No rules configured. Activate the hub to create the 7 default rules automatically.
config.footnote: Changes here are applied on the next cron cycle (analyzers every 15 min, digest on the next configured window). Analyzer toggle and min_score are honored at runtime; quiet_hours/anti-spam affect all future deliveries.

softGate.intro: When the operator tries to approve a recommendation with margin below the limit, it goes to the manager's queue for release. Everything is recorded in the audit log.
softGate.minApprovalHint: Above this %, the operator approves directly. Below, it goes to the manager's queue.
softGate.suspiciousAttemptsHint: If an operator tries to approve below the limit X+ times in 30 days, the manager gets an alert.

responsibles.intro: Who receives deadline alerts + who to alert when an operator tries to approve below the limit.
responsibles.operatorWhatsappHint: Receives deadline alerts. Can be someone without a system login.
responsibles.managerWhatsappHint: Receives pending queue alerts + suspicious attempts. Independent of login.
responsibles.managerIdHint: Optional — who can approve an override in the queue panel

active.intro: When a deadline alert fires, the system creates 1 card in the Active "Campaigns/Promotion" funnel + 1 linked task, forcing human action beyond WhatsApp. Leave empty to disable (keeps sending WhatsApp only).
active.idsHint: Get the IDs in the Active Supabase:

active.pipelineIdHint: UUID of the pipeline created in Active
active.stageInitialHint: UUID of the stage where the card enters when a deadline approaches
active.stagePendingManagerHint: UUID of the stage when a reco lands in the manager's queue (future)
active.stageInCampaignHint: UUID of the stage on successful apply (future)
active.assignedToHint: UUID of the Active user who owns the created cards and tasks
